instruction: Write a Common Lisp macro `with-timing` that executes body, prints the labeled elapsed wall-clock time to *trace-output*, and returns the value of the body. Use gensym to avoid variable capture.
original_failure_log_excerpt:
MISMATCH
EXPECTED: (LET ((#:G1 (GET-INTERNAL-REAL-TIME)))
            (LET ((#:G2 (PROGN (FOO) (BAR))))
              (FORMAT *TRACE-OUTPUT* "~&[~A] ~,3F seconds~%" "task"
                      (FLOAT
                       (/ (- (GET-INTERNAL-REAL-TIME) #:G1)
                          INTERNAL-TIME-UNITS-PER-SECOND)))
              #:G2))
ACTUAL:   (LET ((#:G112 (GET-INTERNAL-REAL-TIME)))
            (LET ((#:G113 (PROGN (FOO) (BAR))))
              (FORMAT *TRACE-OUTPUT* "~&[~A] ~,3F seconds~%" "task"
                      (FLOAT
                       (/ (- (GET-INTERNAL-REAL-TIME) #:G112)
